questions.question: Why does the retrieval client run a BM25 pass and a citation graph pass?
options: Because BM25 needs the graph to build its index
Because lexical hits miss foundational papers with different vocabulary, and graph hits miss papers that share no citation with the seed
Because the mock APIs require it
Because the parser fails otherwise
questions.explanation: Each pass catches what the other misses. Lexical covers shared vocabulary; the graph covers ancestor and descendant papers regardless of vocabulary.
questions.question_zh: 为什么检索客户端要同时跑一遍 BM25 和一遍引用图遍历?
options_zh: 因为 BM25 需要图来构建索引
因为词法命中漏掉用词不同的奠基性论文,而图命中漏掉与 seed 没有共享引用的论文
因为 mock API 要求
因为否则 parser 会失败
questions.explanation_zh: 两路各补另一路的盲点。词法覆盖共享词汇; 图覆盖与 seed 在祖先 / 子孙关系上的论文,无论用词如何。

questions.question: Why is the citation graph traversal capped at two hops?
options: Because beyond two hops the result set tends to drift off topic and overwhelm downstream ranking
Because the Python recursion limit forbids three hops
Because BM25 only scores two hops away
Because the corpus only stores two layers of citations
questions.explanation: Two hops is the practical ceiling. Three hops blows up the result set on a connected graph and rarely returns more on topic papers.
questions.question_zh: 为什么引用图遍历限制为两跳?
options_zh: 因为超过两跳后结果集容易跑题,并淹没下游排序
因为 Python 的递归上限禁止三跳
因为 BM25 只在两跳处打分
因为语料只存了两层引用
questions.explanation_zh: 两跳是实用上限。三跳在连通图上结果集会爆炸,而很少多带来主题相关的论文。

questions.question: What does idf evaluate to for a term that appears in every document?
options: A large positive value
A value near zero
Negative infinity
Undefined; the BM25 implementation skips it
questions.explanation: When df equals N the numerator and denominator inside the log are close, and the +1 keeps the term non negative but small. The contribution of universally common terms is near zero.
questions.question_zh: 对于在每篇文档都出现的词项,idf 的取值是?
options_zh: 一个较大的正值
接近 0 的值
负无穷
未定义; BM25 实现会跳过它
questions.explanation_zh: 当 df 等于 N,log 内部分子分母接近,且 +1 让该项保持非负但很小。普遍常见词的贡献接近 0。

questions.question: Which keys does the merge step use to dedup hits from the two passes?
options: Title text
Stable paper id
Year and first author
BM25 score bucket
questions.explanation: Paper id is the stable handle. Title and author are duplicated across versions, year alone is ambiguous.
questions.question_zh: 合并步骤用什么键去重两路结果?
options_zh: 标题文本
稳定的论文 id
年份与第一作者
BM25 分数桶
questions.explanation_zh: 论文 id 是稳定句柄。标题和作者可能跨版本重复,年份单独不够区分。

questions.question: What does graph_score return for a paper that is two hops from the seed set?
options: Zero
0.3 by default
1.0 by default
The BM25 score divided by ten
questions.explanation: The default graph score schedule is 1.0 at zero hops, 0.6 at one hop, 0.3 at two hops, and zero beyond that.
questions.question_zh: graph_score 对距 seed 集 2 跳的论文返回什么?
options_zh: 默认 0.3
默认 1.0
BM25 分除以 10
questions.explanation_zh: 默认图分时间表是 0 跳为 1.0、1 跳为 0.6、2 跳为 0.3,再远为 0。

questions.question: Why is the corpus loaded once into a RetrievalClient instead of refetched per query?
options: Because the mock APIs are slow on every call
Because the BM25 index and citation graph are built once at construction time and reused across queries
Because the parser is global
Because the recency score requires it
questions.explanation: Index construction is the expensive step. Reusing the index amortises that cost across every query the client handles.
questions.question_zh: 为什么把语料一次性载入 RetrievalClient,而不是每次查询都重新拉取?
options_zh: 因为 mock API 每次调用都很慢
因为 BM25 索引和引用图在构造时建一次,之后跨查询复用
因为 parser 是全局的
因为 recency 分数需要它
questions.explanation_zh: 建索引是昂贵的步骤。复用索引把这部分成本摊到客户端处理的每次查询。
